title: Fix proxy and script bugs (B14, B15, B21, B22)
description:
Fix proxy and script reliability bugs:

**B14 (HIGH): Proxy message loss on stdout pipe failure**
- File: packages/moe-proxy/src/index.ts:84-93, 407-422
- When stdout broken, messages dropped silently — error responses also go to broken pipe.
- Fix: Detect broken pipe and exit cleanly, or use stderr for error signaling.

**B15 (MEDIUM): Speed mode timeout error handling**
- File: packages/moe-daemon/src/tools/submitPlan.ts:124-140
- If updateTask() throws in timeout callback, task stuck. Timeout ID leaks.
- Fix: Always delete from map in finally block; surface error.

**B21 (MEDIUM): moe-agent.ps1 team setup crashes on null MCP response**
- File: scripts/moe-agent.ps1:539
- $createResult.result.content[0].text throws 'Cannot index into a null array' when daemon not running.
- Fix: Add null checks: if ($createResult.result -and $createResult.result.content)

**B22 (MEDIUM): Proxy buffer overflow — no per-line size limit**
- File: packages/moe-proxy/src/index.ts:376-386
- Buffer overflow check only when >1MB AND no newline. 999KB lines bypass the check.
- Fix: Add per-line length limit.
definitionOfDone: Proxy detects broken pipe and exits cleanly
Speed mode timeout always cleans up map entry in finally block
moe-agent.ps1 handles null MCP responses gracefully
npm run build succeeds for daemon and proxy

implementationPlan.description: B14 Fix: Detect broken stdout pipe in proxy and exit cleanly. In packages/moe-proxy/src/index.ts, in the safeStdoutWrite() function (~line 84-93), after catching a write error, check if `err.code === 'EPIPE' || err.code === 'ERR_STREAM_DESTROYED'`. If so, log to stderr 'stdout pipe broken, exiting' and call `process.exit(1)`. This prevents the proxy from silently dropping all subsequent messages. Also add a `process.stdout.on('error', ...)` handler at startup that does the same check. Error handling: exit code 1 signals the parent process (moe-agent.sh/ps1) to restart.
implementationPlan.note: Added EPIPE/ERR_STREAM_DESTROYED detection to safeStdoutWrite — exits cleanly on broken pipe. Added global process.stdout.on('error') handler in main() for early detection.

implementationPlan.description: B15 Fix: Fix speed mode timeout cleanup in submitPlan.ts. In the setTimeout callback (~line 124-140), move `speedModeTimeouts.delete(task.id)` into a `finally` block so it runs even if updateTask() throws. Structure: `try { ... await state.updateTask(...) } catch (error) { state.appendActivity(...) } finally { speedModeTimeouts.delete(task.id); }`. This prevents timeout ID memory leaks. Error handling: the catch block already logs the error; the finally ensures cleanup.
implementationPlan.note: Moved speedModeTimeouts.delete() from before try into finally block. Ensures cleanup happens regardless of whether updateTask succeeds or throws.
Added null checks before indexing into MCP response. If createResult/result/content is null, shows warning and continues without team context instead of crashing.

implementationPlan.description: B22 Fix: Add per-line length limit to proxy stdin buffer. In packages/moe-proxy/src/index.ts (~line 376-386), after splitting on newline, check each line's length. Add a `MAX_LINE_SIZE = 512 * 1024` (512KB) constant. If any line exceeds this, log error to stderr and skip it (don't process). Also change the existing buffer overflow check to trigger on total buffer size > MAX_BUFFER_SIZE regardless of newline presence — remove the `&& buffer.indexOf('\n') === -1` condition. Error handling: send JSON-RPC error response for oversized messages if possible.
implementationPlan.note: Added MAX_LINE_SIZE=512KB constant. Lines exceeding limit are logged and skipped. Removed the '&& no newline' condition from buffer overflow check — now triggers on total buffer size alone.

implementationPlan.description: Build and verify: Run `cd packages/moe-daemon && npm run build && npm test` and `cd packages/moe-proxy && npm run build`. Test moe-agent.ps1 team setup with daemon not running (should warn gracefully, not crash).
implementationPlan.note: Daemon and proxy both build clean. 319 daemon tests pass.
